name: Psychic Surgery
description: Repair broken bones, internal injuries, and remove foreign objects; treat coma victims (zero or fewer hit points). Recovery from coma: 1–66% as hospital treatment. No scarring; minimal pain.

duration.summary: Varies with injury; surgery time is half conventional medicine.

lengthOfTrance.summary: 2D6 minutes preparatory meditation plus surgery duration.

prerequisites.label: Psychic Diagnosis must be performed before surgery is possible.

limitations.otherLimitations: No tools needed — only the psychic's hands.
